audit_items.proof_trace: freeHintsCallback is a trivial two-line function: it calls sdsfree(ptr) then returns immediately — no code executes after the free, ruling out UAF. Double-free is impossible because the hint pointer is stack-local in linenoise's refreshShowHints and freed exactly once under a single `if (hint)` guard. sdsfree itself is NULL-safe (deps/hiredis/sds.c:156), providing an additional safety layer.
